channel.title: learn on Dr. Suat ATAN
channel.description: Recent content in learn on Dr. Suat ATAN

item.title: Introduction to Network Analysis with R
item.description: Quick Start Instead of theoretical explanations let’s just think about this scenario. You are monitoring e-mails between these persons A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H without details of the e-mails. Just the traffic of the emails. You have this table: From To A B A C D E D F E G E H A H B H We say directed because there is an arrow from A to B.
